name: Linzer Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Use blanched almonds or hazelnuts.
2. Beat butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in egg yolks, apple juice concentrate, and vanilla extract.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and allspice; mix well.
5. Stir in almonds.
6. Gradually add to butter mixture, mixing until well-blended.
7. Spread 1-1/2 cups batter evenly onto the bottom of a 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom or 10-inch springform pan.
8. Spread fruit evenly over batter, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge.
9. Spoon remaining batter into a pastry bag fitted with a 1/2-inch plain or star tip.
10. Pipe batter in a lattice design over the fruit spread.
11. Chill for 30 minutes.
12. Preheat oven to 350°F.
13. Bake tart for 35 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the fruit spread is bubbly.
14. Cool completely on a wire rack.
15. Serve at room temperature.
